name: Ridgepost Capital, Inc.
summary: PART I . Our Company We are a leading multi-asset class private market solutions provider in the alternative asset management industry. Our mission is to provide our investors differentiated access to a broad set of investment solutions that address their diverse investment needs within private markets. We structure, manage, and monitor portfolios of private market investments, which include specialized funds and customized separate accounts within primary investment funds, secondary investments...
